title: Ahinaa's Heroes
description: A mod that brings your favorite characters to life in minecraft.
body:
##### This mod is still being updated and worked on.

Join this discord to come into the community and be able to suggest your favorite characters along with seeing the announcements and progress of the mod.

### [Discord](https://discord.gg/Tu7Kr92b2Y)  

### **KEEP UP WITH THE PROGRESS AND FUTURE UPDATES ON THE [TRELLO](https://trello.com/b/krIXDIAE/ahinaas-heroes)**

### **[PEHKUI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ahinaas-heroes/relations/dependencies?page=1&type=RequiredDependency) IS A REQUIRED DEPENDENCY AND [JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) IS RECOMMENDED FOR RECIPES.**

Currently in the mod there is a couple characters: Antman, Aqua-man, Deadpool, Captain 
America, Ironman, Gambit, Cyclops and many many more.  

This mod brings injections and suits to truly become earth's mightiest heroes… or villains. 
 
The mod makes use of 4 key binds that are automatically bound to:

**SHIFT + RIGHT CLICK** - Item ability

**C** - Superpower ability

**SHIFT + C** - Scroll through Superpower Abilities

**X** - Suit ability 1

**Z** - Suit ability 2  

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1002320/description_79a95efc-bd10-48e9-8678-0590e485cb99.png)

Credits:  
Mod Creator - [Ahinaa](https://www.youtube.com/@aahinaa)
